entries.title: Overview
entries.description: TypeScript SDK for confidential smart contracts — shield, transfer, and unshield tokens with Fully Homomorphic Encryption.

entries.title: Overview
entries.description: Learn how to set up and build your first confidential dApp with the Zama SDK. These tutorials take you from installation to a working app.

entries.title: Quick start
entries.description: Get from zero to a working confidential transfer in under 5 minutes.

entries.title: Build your first confidential dApp
entries.description: End-to-end tutorial building a token dashboard with React, wagmi, and the Zama React SDK.

entries.title: Overview
entries.description: Step-by-step guides for common tasks with the Zama SDK. Each guide covers a single topic with code examples for both the core SDK and React hooks.

entries.title: Configuration
entries.description: How to set up the SDK's three required pieces — relayer, signer, and storage.

entries.title: Authentication
entries.description: How to authenticate with the relayer using a backend proxy or a direct API key.

entries.title: Shield tokens
entries.description: How to convert public ERC-20 tokens into their confidential form.

entries.title: Transfer privately
entries.description: How to send confidential tokens so the amount stays hidden on-chain.

entries.title: Unshield tokens
entries.description: Convert confidential tokens back to public ERC-20 by unshielding them.

entries.title: Check balances
entries.description: Decrypt and read confidential token balances using the SDK and React hooks.

entries.title: Handle errors
entries.description: Catch, match, and recover from SDK errors in your application.

entries.title: Node.js backend
entries.description: How to use the SDK in a Node.js server environment with worker threads and per-request isolation.

entries.title: Web extensions
entries.description: How to use the SDK in MV3 Chrome extensions with persistent session storage.

entries.title: Local development
entries.description: How to use the cleartext relayer for local Hardhat nodes and custom chain deployments without a KMS or gateway.

entries.title: Build with an LLM
entries.description: How to give coding agents high-quality Zama SDK context through llms files and the external Zama Protocol Claude Code skill.

entries.title: Next.js / SSR
entries.description: How to use the SDK with Next.js and server-side rendering frameworks.

entries.title: Operator approvals
entries.description: How to approve another address to act on your confidential tokens.

entries.title: Encrypt & decrypt
entries.description: How to encrypt values and decrypt FHE ciphertext handles for custom confidential smart contracts that are not wrapped ERC-20 tokens.

entries.title: Overview
entries.description: API reference for the core `@zama-fhe/sdk` package. Each page documents a single class or utility with constructor options, methods, properties, and working code examples.

entries.title: ZamaSDK
entries.description: Entry point for all confidential contract operations.

entries.title: Token
entries.description: Read/write interface for confidential ERC-20 operations.

entries.title: ReadonlyToken
entries.description: Read-only interface for confidential token queries and batch operations.

entries.title: WrappersRegistry
entries.description: Query the on-chain token wrappers registry — list pairs, look up tokens, and validate confidential tokens.

entries.title: RelayerWeb
entries.description: Browser relayer that runs FHE operations in a Web Worker via WASM.

entries.title: RelayerNode
entries.description: Node.js relayer that runs FHE operations in native worker threads.

entries.title: RelayerCleartext
entries.description: Development relayer that operates in cleartext mode without FHE, KMS, or gateway dependencies.

entries.title: ViemSigner
entries.description: Signer adapter that wraps viem wallet and public clients for the SDK.

entries.title: EthersSigner
entries.description: Signer adapter that wraps ethers providers and signers for the SDK.

entries.title: WagmiSigner
entries.description: React-only signer adapter that wraps a wagmi config with automatic session revocation.

entries.title: GenericSigner
entries.description: Interface that all signer adapters must implement for the SDK to interact with wallets.

entries.title: GenericStorage
entries.description: Interface for async key-value storage used to persist FHE keypairs and session signatures.

entries.title: Error types
entries.description: All SDK error classes, codes, and the matchZamaError utility.

entries.title: Contract call builders
entries.description: Low-level builders that return raw contract call configs for viem, ethers, or custom execution layers.

entries.title: FheArtifactCache
entries.description: Persistent cache for FHE public key and public parameters, avoiding re-downloads across sessions.

entries.title: Event decoders
entries.description: Decode on-chain logs into typed event objects.

entries.title: Delegated decryption
entries.description: Delegation lets one address grant another address the right to decrypt its confidential balance.

entries.title: Network presets
entries.description: Pre-configured network settings for Ethereum Mainnet, Sepolia, and Hardhat.

entries.title: Overview
entries.description: API reference for the `@zama-fhe/react-sdk` package. Each page documents a single hook or component with parameters, return values, and working code examples. All hooks are built on TanStack Query with automatic cache invalidation and cached decryption.

entries.title: ZamaProvider
entries.description: Context provider that supplies the Zama SDK to all descendant hooks.

entries.title: useConfidentialBalance
entries.description: Decrypt a single token's confidential balance.

entries.title: useConfidentialBalances
entries.description: Decrypt and poll multiple tokens' confidential balances in a single query.

entries.title: useConfidentialTransfer
entries.description: Send confidential ERC-20 tokens privately.

entries.title: useConfidentialTransferFrom
entries.description: Transfer confidential tokens on behalf of an owner who approved you as an operator.

entries.title: useShield
entries.description: Mutation hook that shields public ERC-20 tokens into confidential form.

entries.title: useUnshield
entries.description: Mutation hook that unshields confidential tokens back to public ERC-20.

entries.title: useUnshieldAll
entries.description: Mutation hook that unshields the entire confidential balance.

entries.title: useResumeUnshield
entries.description: Mutation hook that resumes an unshield interrupted between unwrap and finalize steps.

entries.title: useUnwrap
entries.description: Low-level mutation hook that requests an unwrap for a specific amount.

entries.title: useUnwrapAll
entries.description: Low-level mutation hook that requests an unwrap for the full confidential balance.

entries.title: useFinalizeUnwrap
entries.description: Low-level mutation hook that finalizes an unwrap with the decryption proof.

entries.title: useAllow
entries.description: Mutation hook that signs an EIP-712 message authorizing decryption of confidential handles for any contract.

entries.title: useIsAllowed
entries.description: Query hook that checks whether a session signature is cached and valid.

entries.title: useRevoke
entries.description: Revoke the EIP-712 decrypt authorization for specific contract addresses.

entries.title: useRevokeSession
entries.description: Revoke the entire session for the connected wallet.

entries.title: useConfidentialApprove
entries.description: Approve an operator to act on your confidential tokens.

entries.title: useConfidentialIsApproved
entries.description: Check if a spender is approved as operator for your confidential tokens.

entries.title: useUnderlyingAllowance
entries.description: Read the ERC-20 allowance of the underlying public token for the wrapper contract.

entries.title: useWrapperDiscovery
entries.description: Find the confidential wrapper contract address for an ERC-20 token via the on-chain registry.

entries.title: useWrappersRegistryAddress
entries.description: Resolve the wrappers registry contract address for the current chain.

entries.title: useListPairs
entries.description: Fetch paginated token wrapper pairs from the on-chain registry, with optional metadata enrichment.

entries.title: useTokenPairsRegistry
entries.description: Fetch all token wrapper pairs from the on-chain registry.

entries.title: useTokenPairsLength
entries.description: Get the total number of token wrapper pairs in the registry.

entries.title: useTokenPairsSlice
entries.description: Fetch a range of token wrapper pairs from the registry by index.

entries.title: useTokenPair
entries.description: Fetch a single token wrapper pair by index from the registry.

entries.title: useConfidentialTokenAddress
entries.description: Look up the confidential token address for a given plain ERC-20 token.

entries.title: useTokenAddress
entries.description: Reverse lookup -- find the plain ERC-20 address for a given confidential token.

entries.title: useIsConfidentialTokenValid
entries.description: Check whether a confidential token is registered and valid in the on-chain registry.

entries.title: useMetadata
entries.description: Get token name, symbol, and decimals in one call.

entries.title: useZamaSDK
entries.description: Hook to access the raw ZamaSDK instance from ZamaProvider context.

entries.title: useToken
entries.description: Hook to get a memoized Token instance for a given address.

entries.title: useReadonlyToken
entries.description: Hook to get a memoized ReadonlyToken instance for read-only access.

entries.title: useEncrypt
entries.description: Low-level mutation hook that encrypts a plaintext value using the relayer's FHE engine.

entries.title: useUserDecrypt
entries.description: Query hook that automatically decrypts FHE handles once credentials are available via useAllow.

entries.title: useGenerateKeypair
entries.description: Low-level mutation hook that generates a fresh FHE keypair via the relayer.

entries.title: useDelegateDecryption
entries.description: Mutation hook that grants FHE decryption rights for a token to another address.

entries.title: useRevokeDelegation
entries.description: Mutation hook that revokes FHE decryption delegation for a token.

entries.title: useDelegationStatus
entries.description: Query hook that checks whether a decryption delegation is active between two addresses.

entries.title: useDecryptBalanceAs
entries.description: Mutation hook that decrypts another user's confidential balance as a delegate.

entries.title: useBatchDecryptBalancesAs
entries.description: Mutation hook that decrypts confidential balances across multiple tokens as a delegate.

entries.title: Query keys
entries.description: Reference for the zamaQueryKeys factory used for manual React Query cache control.

entries.title: Overview
entries.description: Core concepts and architecture behind the Zama SDK. These pages explain how the SDK works under the hood — the session model, security guarantees, and caching strategy.

entries.title: Architecture
entries.description: The SDK is organized into layers, each with a clear responsibility. Higher layers depend on lower layers but never the reverse.

entries.title: Session model
entries.description: How the SDK manages FHE keypairs, wallet signatures, and session lifecycle.

entries.title: Security model
entries.description: Threat model, trust assumptions, and security architecture of the Zama SDK.

entries.title: example-hoodi README
entries.description: Next.js app demonstrating ERC-7984 confidential token operations on the Hoodi testnet and ethers — including on-chain ACL delegation.

entries.title: example-hoodi WALKTHROUGH
entries.description: ERC-7984 is a token standard that adds confidential balances and transfer amounts to ERC-20 tokens. Instead of storing plaintext balances on-chain, balances are stored as encrypted handles. Only the token owner can decrypt their own balance.

entries.title: node-ethers README
entries.description: Node.js script demonstrating the full ERC-7984 confidential token lifecycle using `@zama-fhe/sdk` with ethers v6.

entries.title: node-ethers WALKTHROUGH
entries.description: ERC-7984 is a token standard that adds confidential balances and transfer amounts to ERC-20 tokens. Balances are stored as encrypted handles on-chain; only the token owner (or an authorized delegate) can decrypt them.

entries.title: node-viem README
entries.description: Node.js script demonstrating the full ERC-7984 confidential token lifecycle using `@zama-fhe/sdk` with viem.

entries.title: node-viem WALKTHROUGH
entries.description: ERC-7984 is a token standard that adds confidential balances and transfer amounts to ERC-20 tokens. Balances are stored as encrypted handles on-chain; only the token owner (or an authorized delegate) can decrypt them.

entries.title: react-ethers README
entries.description: Next.js 16 example app demonstrating how to integrate `@zama-fhe/react-sdk` with ethers v6 on Sepolia testnet.

entries.title: react-ethers WALKTHROUGH
entries.description: A step-by-step guide to how this app integrates `@zama-fhe/react-sdk` using ethers v6.

entries.title: react-viem README
entries.description: Next.js 16 example app demonstrating how to integrate `@zama-fhe/react-sdk` with viem v2 on Sepolia testnet.

entries.title: react-viem WALKTHROUGH
entries.description: A step-by-step guide to how this app integrates `@zama-fhe/react-sdk` using viem v2.

entries.title: react-wagmi README
entries.description: Next.js 16 example app demonstrating how to integrate `@zama-fhe/react-sdk` with wagmi v3 on Sepolia testnet.

entries.title: react-wagmi WALKTHROUGH
entries.description: A step-by-step guide to how this app integrates `@zama-fhe/react-sdk` using wagmi v3.

entries.title: Repository README
entries.description: Monorepo overview, package layout, development workflow, and repository setup for the Zama SDK.

entries.title: @zama-fhe/sdk
entries.description: Core TypeScript SDK for confidential token operations, relayers, signer adapters, and low-level contract APIs.

entries.title: @zama-fhe/react-sdk
entries.description: React SDK with ZamaProvider, confidential token hooks, and TanStack Query integration on top of the core SDK.
